title: pinus taeda var. rigida
intro: Pinus taeda var. rigida, also known as the stiff needle pine, is a variety of the loblolly pine tree, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce pain, and combat infections. The health benefits of Pinus taeda var. rigida include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make topical creams and salves for skin conditions and pain relief.
